title: Controller reliability and automation closure
summary: Closed the gap between process readiness and trustworthy automation reporting, added reliability operations guidance, fixed bounded job summary behavior, integrated managed Google runtime credentials and Local Bridge reliability changes, and verified the committed controller surface.
goals: Make automation status distinguish shadow observations from live maintenance/execution.
Surface degraded execution readiness separately from process-level readiness.
Improve resource and stale runtime cleanup guidance for multi-repository operation.
Keep the repository clean and verify targeted controller checks.
nonGoals: No destructive cleanup without explicit safe preview.
acceptanceCriteria: Controller readiness or docs clearly distinguish runtime readiness, delivery readiness, and automation readiness.
Shadow schedules and maintenance schedules are documented or configured so users understand what actually runs.
Resource diagnostics for high-CPU peer MCP processes and stale temp entries are actionable.
Targeted checks pass and worktree is clean after commit.

tasks.title: Harden automation readiness reporting
tasks.objective: Inspect schedule/readiness code and update user-facing reporting or documentation so shadow schedules are not mistaken for active autonomous execution.
acceptanceCriteria: Readiness/reporting distinguishes shadow mode from live execution.
notes: RUN-iss-20260710-a4bb9a-t1-1783647663444-337d7ff4 finished successfully. Automatic integration is starting.
Automatic integration failed for RUN-iss-20260710-a4bb9a-t1-1783647663444-337d7ff4: 5 edit operations failed precondition checks
Auto-integration preconditions failed because main changed concurrently. Reviewed the isolated diff, committed it on the task branch, merged it into main, and validated the merged result.

Manual closeout after branch merge: focused tests passed 28/28, package:check:type passed, and package:check:controller-v8 passed on merged main. The original Run cannot be re-finished because its worktree is clean and already merged.

tasks.title: Document reliability operations runbook
tasks.objective: Add or update docs for runtime maintenance, projection rebuild, high-CPU peer MCP handling, plugin degraded states, and board governance cleanup.
acceptanceCriteria: Runbook gives concrete steps for the defects found in this inspection.
Docs mention multi-repository resource isolation and plugin auth states.
notes: Added and merged docs/operations/controller-reliability-runbook.md with readiness layers, schedule diagnosis, maintenance, resource isolation, cleanup, plugin states, and board governance.
Verification evidence passed and low_risk_change policy auto-completed the Task.

acceptanceResults.criterion: Runbook gives concrete steps for the defects found in this inspection.
acceptanceResults.evidence: The runbook documents layered readiness, maintenance sequencing, schedule diagnosis, failure classification, cleanup, and board closeout.

acceptanceResults.criterion: Docs mention multi-repository resource isolation and plugin auth states.
acceptanceResults.evidence: Dedicated sections cover peer repository process ownership, no cross-repository termination, and enabled/ready/degraded/disabled/not-applicable plugin states.
